scripts.migrate: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec api pnpm prisma migrate dev
scripts.generate: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec api pnpm prisma generate
scripts.studio: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec api pnpm prisma studio --port 5556 --browser none
scripts.test: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec api pnpm test
